name: Byclaw SQLite
description: Expose the local byclaw SQLite database through a single sqlExecute capability for tools and Gateway HTTP callers.

dbPath.description: SQLite database file path. Relative paths resolve from this plugin directory. Defaults to OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/memory/byclaw.sqlite.

httpPath.description: Gateway HTTP route path used for direct external invocation.

maxRows.description: Maximum number of result rows returned by read queries.
